name: Sol

planets.name: Venus
planets.description: Atmospheric research arrays floating in clouds.

planets.name: Earth
planets.description: Capital of the Alliance of Free Worlds.

planets.name: Mars
planets.description: Heavy planetary defense grids and shipyards.

description: The cradle of human civilization and historical capital of the Free Alliance.

name: Valhalla Black Hole
description: A massive supermassive black hole. The sheer gravity well requires ships to exit jumps far out, making it a critical choke-point and trade gateway.

name: Sinistra Black Hole
description: A quiet, dark singularity nestled on the edge of Federation Territory. Jump corridors from here link deep into Free Space.

name: Nair Al Saif Black Hole
description: The premier nexus of Federation Space, dominated by heavy orbital infrastructure and monumental fleet garrisons.

name: The Edge Black Hole
description: Marking the physical boundary of the Edge territory. It connects Ombra Space to the Core through highly unstable jump streams.

name: The Cradle

planets.name: Cradle Prime
planets.description: Highly advanced metropolitan areas covering vast archipelagos.

description: Considered the geometric and political center of the known galaxy. Renowned for its ancient hyper-tech ruins.

name: Holborn
description: A quiet, lush system heavily integrated into the Core's trading network.

name: Vega

planets.name: Vega Prime
planets.description: Continuous industrial smelting and alloy refinement.

description: A blistering hot yellow star fueling massive production centers across the Core.

name: Kelsen

planets.name: Kelsen III
planets.description: Helium-3 scoop-stations floating in the high atmospheres.

description: The primary fuel refining hub of the central Core.

name: Fornax

planets.name: Fornax Major
planets.description: Automated geothermal drill rigs tapping the mantle.

description: A military fallback outpost guarding the Core's eastern frontier from external incursions.

name: Krane Daes
description: A dim white dwarf star acting as a key navigation beacon on the southern hyper-lanes.

name: Io

planets.name: Io Minor
planets.description: Extremely cold silicate planet containing hidden pirate coves.

description: A lawless system on the border of the Edge, where independent freelancers trade outside Union laws.

name: Betria

planets.name: Betria Prime
planets.description: Rich ecosystems but heavily isolated from core trade.

description: A remote planetary system situated deep within the southern edge of galactic space.

name: Rana

planets.name: Rana Secundus
planets.description: Home to deep-sea geothermal vents and scientific outposts.

description: A major customs and security gate leading into core Federation territory.

name: Shaula
description: The northern shield of Ombra Space. Constant security patrols ward off marauders.

name: Ghienna
description: A vital Breadbasket star system, linking the Core with outer Federation borders.

name: Aldhafera
description: A bright cyan system heavily defended by standard Federation patrols.

name: Kastra
description: A transit point with an automated hyper-beacons guiding commercial shipping lanes.

name: Enif
description: A small white star on the core periphery.

name: Pictor
description: Mining operations are scattered around this hot yellow dwarf's asteroid belt.

name: Minkar
description: A quiet peripheral system.

name: Meka
description: Known for hosting minor scientific arrays researching quantum mechanics.

name: Capella
description: A peaceful yellow star tucked away in private Federation sectors.

name: Nashira

planets.name: Nashira Void Ring
planets.description: Massive residential structure circling the star.

description: The strategic command center of the upper Federation. Extremely high military presence.

name: Zaniah
description: A white system supporting cargo networks and high-frequency beacons.

name: Terebel
description: An outpost system at the northernmost sector of known star routes.

name: Adrianus

planets.name: Adrianus IV
planets.description: Rich heavy metal ores mined by automated heavy machinery.

description: An industrial star system supplying shipyards in Nashira.

name: Tyl
description: The eastern frontier sentinel of Federation Space.

name: Valhalla Nexus
description: An automated radar relay safeguarding the northern access to Valhalla's gravity well.

name: Valhalla South
description: A calm, uncolonized yellow dwarf system serving as a core refueling pitstop on the southern jump routes.

name: Vanguard Prime

planets.name: Vanguard Station Core
planets.description: A massive militarized biosphere shielding outer borders.

description: The spearhead base of the Alliance's outer defense fleet.

name: Vanguard Alpha
description: Unexplored system cataloged in the outer peripheral cloud of the Alliance sector.

name: Vanguard Beta
description: A dense asteroid belt system surrounding a small red dwarf.

name: Nair Gateway
description: Customs inspection node screening vessels heading into the Nair Al Saif Black Hole hub.

name: Sinistra Minor
description: Peripheral sector beacon marking the extreme western border of Federation control.

name: Capella Minor
description: Lesser red dwarf system supporting regional communication relay dishes.

name: Adrianus Outpost
description: Scientific outpost studying high-radiation emissions from the neighboring jump nexus.

name: Terebel Outpost
description: Cold, desolate sector containing only an automated navigation lighthouse.

name: Ombra Outpost Alpha
description: First-contact border garrison monitoring deep hyperlane signals exiting Ombra Space.

name: Ombra Hub
description: Central trade nexus of Ombra Space, dealing in high-value asteroid ores and salvage materials.

name: Void Sentry
description: Uncolonized beacon system marking the gateway into deep unregulated void lanes.

name: Ombra Deep Outpost
description: A remote orbital research lab positioned on the dangerous outer fringes of the eastern sector.

name: Maestia Gate
description: Heavy planetary defensive fort guarding the main hyperlane into the Empire.

name: Maestia Prime

planets.name: Crown World
planets.description: Lush paradise and administrative heart of the Maestia Dynasty.

description: The dazzling, crown-jewel capital of the Empire of Maestia.

name: Aegis
description: Shield system hosting massive kinetic deflection grids protecting imperial sectors.

name: Crown Jewel
description: Rich gemstone miner system, containing massive refinery platforms.

name: Titan Forge
description: Orbital macro-forges generating state-of-the-art battleships for the imperial fleet.

name: Edge Sentinel
description: A monitoring node charting unpredictable gravitational pulses in the local dark-matter stream.

name: Terminus
description: The absolute southern terminus of official navigation charts. Beacons beyond this point are silent.

name: Outer Haven

planets.name: Haven City
planets.description: A safe haven city built inside hollowed out asteroid bodies.

description: An independent smuggler port and commercial oasis at the edge of the galaxy.

name: Edge Outpost 9
description: A rugged scout outstation tracking migration patterns of deep-space nomad caravans.
